# Shubham Sunny

> Website Modernization for US Businesses. I redesign outdated business websites so they look professional, work perfectly on phones, and make it easy for customers to contact you. No tech jargon — just clear results.

- Last updated: 2026-06-25

- Audience: US and global small business owners with outdated websites

## Services
Website Redesign | Mobile-First | Speed & SEO | WhatsApp Integration

## Packages
- Starter Refresh: from $499 USD — For sites that need a quick professional upgrade without a full rebuild.
- Business Modernization: from $1,499 USD — Our most popular package — a complete trust makeover for your business.
- Growth Website: from $2,999 USD — For businesses ready to grow online and capture more leads.

- Fashion E-Commerce Store (Retail): Mobile sales increased 61% with faster checkout.

## Before & After
- Local Dental Clinic (Healthcare): Their 2015 template looked outdated on phones. We rebuilt it with clear booking buttons and a modern, trustworthy design.
- Family Restaurant (Food & Hospitality): Slow, cluttered homepage → clean menu, hours, and click-to-call. Customers started calling from mobile within the first week.
- Law Office (Professional Services): Generic template → premium look that matches their reputation. Clear practice areas and a simple contact form.

## FAQ
- Q: Do I need to know anything technical? A: No. I handle everything and explain each step in plain English. You focus on your business — I handle the website.
- Q: How long does a website redesign take? A: Most projects take 2–4 weeks depending on scope. I give you a clear timeline before we start.
- Q: Will my site work on phones? A: Yes — every site I build is mobile-first. Most of your customers will visit on their phone, so this is non-negotiable.
- Q: Do you work with US time zones? A: Absolutely. I schedule calls and updates around your timezone and keep communication simple via WhatsApp or email.
- Q: What if I already have a website? A: Perfect — that is exactly what I modernize. I take your outdated site and transform it into something you are proud to share.
- Q: How do we get started? A: Message me on WhatsApp for a free website review. I will look at your current site and suggest the best path forward — no pressure.
- Q: What happens after launch? A: I make sure everything works before handoff. You get a site that is fast, mobile-ready, and easy for customers to contact you.
- Q: Can you add WhatsApp chat to my site? A: Yes. One-click WhatsApp contact is included in all packages — customers can reach you instantly from any page.
